name: Dumpster Dive Live
short_description: An interactive and cozy raccoon fueled trash digging game for your Twitch viewers. Viewers can dig through your garbage with commands, subs, gift subs, and bit donations. Ideal for keeping chat engaged during content that requires extra attention, or while on long breaks.
detailed_description:
An interactive and cozy raccoon fueled trash digging game for your Twitch viewers.

It can be added as either a transparent or chroma keyed overlay for your stream. Viewers can dig through your garbage with commands, subs, gift subs, and bit donations.

Ideal for keeping chat engaged during content that requires extra attention, or while on long breaks.

IMPORTANT 

This game is intended solely for Twitch streamers. It will not work with YouTube, TikTok, etc.
If you do not stream on Twitch you will not be able to enjoy the features of this game.

※ The leaderboard panel and stats command are not available in the demo version ※

If you see a black background when using transparency mode, please check that the "Allow Transparency" setting in OBS is enabled. You can find it by right-clicking the game capture source and choosing Properties.

reviews.review_text: Easy  to set up and the pixel art is super adorable!  Everyone was excited to !dig for their treasures! Cant recommend enough!!!
great game, viewers love the interaction, totally worth the small price tag. the dev is super cool too =]
